name: IT Hell
short_description: You are dead. Welcome to the IT Hell where you have to fight developers, critical bugs and your old equipment to make you way through it. Armed with your keyboard...and some guns, advance through different levels, upgrade your stats and reach the final boss!
detailed_description:
IT Hell is 2D Platformer action game. You are a test-engineer who has recently died and went to the IT Hell.
Make your way through this bloody place using different weapons - keyboard, shotgun, crossbow, etc.
Fight your enemies - shoot 'em, hit 'em, rip their hearts out - whatever makes them die.

Upgrade your stats so you can survive in this "user-UnFriendly" place and make it to the final Boss.
The characters you will meet are inspired by the stereotypes of the people involved in the IT industry.

"Every test-engineer has the heart of a developer...in a jar...on his desk!"
